scripts.generate: mkdir -p generated/Sources/Pachca/GeneratedSources && cp ../../packages/spec/openapi.yaml generated/Sources/Pachca/openapi.yaml && swift run swift-openapi-generator generate --config generated/Sources/Pachca/openapi-generator-config.yaml --output-directory generated/Sources/Pachca/GeneratedSources generated/Sources/Pachca/openapi.yaml && bun generate-client.ts
